description: Public-safe synthetic saved goal trace for local-only Session Continuity Sidecar preview review.

trace_events.content: /goal Build a local Session Continuity Sidecar preview. It must read only a saved trace, segment long runs, extract source-backed decisions, produce MemoryEvidencePacket, ConsequenceVisa, ModelStateSurfacePassport, and render a next-session context packet.

Decision: public preview is limited to local evidence compilation. It does not create public adoption, major significance, stable protocol, compatibility, benchmark, privacy, safety, or package claims.

Command result: deterministic fixture checks passed for schemas/json/ctxvault-session-continuity-sidecar-v0.schema.json and tests/test_session_continuity_sidecar.py. No provider/model calls, runtime adapter execution, target writes, memory backend writes, or memory promotion occurred.

Uncertainty: opaque provider compaction, prompt cache hits, checkpoint state, and vector/RAG memories can preserve state that is not visible. Treat them as ModelStateSurfacePassport observations only; cache_reuse, adapter_route, sampler_bias, and act remain blocked.

Release boundary: this synthetic fixture demonstrates the local preview shape only. It does not imply tag publication, package-registry publication, outreach, stable protocol status, or compatibility support.

Review boundary: generated next-session context should include only source-backed items, keep lower-priority details out of the visible packet, and treat feedback as reviewer signal rather than adoption proof.
